11:[["$","h1",null,{"children":"System Design"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"High-level system architecture and component interactions."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Component Diagram",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","$L13",null,{}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Core Components",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Memory Manager",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Central orchestrator handling all CRUD operations. Routes operations to appropriate memory tiers and manages cross-tier consistency."}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Retrieval Engine",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Hybrid search coordinator. Dispatches queries to vector and text indices, then fuses results using configurable ranking algorithms."}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Sleep Consolidator",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Background worker running consolidation cycles. Compresses, promotes, extracts, and evicts entries according to retention policies."}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Index Manager",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Maintains all database indices: vector embeddings (via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}],"), FTS5 full-text, and temporal graph relationships."]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Technology Stack",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"| Layer | Technology | Purpose |\n|-------|-----------|---------|\n| Database | SQLite 3.45+ | Primary storage |\n| Vectors | sqlite-vec | Vector similarity search |\n| Text | FTS5 | Full-text search |\n| Embeddings | OpenAI / SentenceTransformers | Text-to-vector |\n| ORM | SQLAlchemy | Schema management |\n| API | FastAPI | REST endpoints |"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Scaling Considerations",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne is designed for single-node deployments:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Working Memory"}],": In-memory LRU with SQLite backing"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Episodic Memory"}],": SQLite with vector extension"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Semantic Memory"}],": Native graph in SQLite"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"For multi-agent deployments, each agent maintains its own database instance. Shared memory is achieved via explicit synchronization, not concurrent database access."}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L14",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m21.73 18-8-14a2 2 0 0 0-3.48 0l-8 14A2 2 0 0 0 4 21h16a2 2 0 0 0 1.73-3","key":"wmoenq"}],["path",{"d":"M12 9v4","key":"juzpu7"}],["path",{"d":"M12 17h.01","key":"p32p05"}]],"className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Not a Distributed System"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne does not support distributed or clustered deployments. For high-availability requirements, use SQLite replication (Litestream) or export/import between instances."}]}]]}]]}]}]]
